repos.name: categorizer
repos.purpose: Product monorepo with explicit module ownership for parallel application, ML, and verification work.
contains: apps/androidApp: Android entry point, packaging, permissions, camera/gallery, filesystem, database, and ONNX adapters
shared/domain: entities, repository contracts, recognition contracts, and use cases
shared/ui: Compose screens, navigation, presentation state, and reusable UI components
ml: dataset manifests, license records, training, evaluation, export, and model-card tooling
models: approved model manifest, class map, notices, and release-ready bundled artifact
verification: cross-runtime fixtures, device benchmarks, archive fixtures, and release evidence
docs: architecture decisions, data/model governance, privacy behavior, and developer setup
assembly: lifecycle source of truth and generated planning artifacts
excludes: Remote backend, authentication, cloud synchronization, telemetry, and remote inference
iOS or desktop application deliverables in the MVP
Task backlog and task batches until this planning package is merged
Generated training datasets, caches, checkpoints, and experimental model binaries in normal Git history
